song.title: It is God's Intent and Pleasure
song.presentation: v1 c v2 c v3 c v4 c v5 c v6 c
song.lyrics: [v1] It is God’s intent and pleasure To have Christ revealed in me, Nothing outward as religion, But His Christ within to be. [c] It is God’s intent and pleasure That His Christ be wrought in me; Nothing outwardly performing, But His Christ my all to be. [v2] It is God’s intent and pleasure That His Christ may live in me; Nothing as an outward practice, But Christ working inwardly [v3] It is God’s intent and pleasure That His Christ be formed in me; Not the outward forms to follow, But Christ growing inwardly. [v4] It is God’s intent and pleasure That His Christ make home in me; Not just outwardly to serve Him, But Christ dwelling inwardly [v5] It is God’s intent and pleasure That His Christ my hope may be; It is not objective glory, But ‘tis Christ subjectively [v6] It is God’s intent and pleasure That His Christ be all in me; Nothing outwardly possessing, But His Christ eternally.
